rationale: The cited paper is strongly topically aligned (movie-industry determinants of box office, including sequel effects), which could plausibly support the citing study’s prerelease movie-characteristic controls in the same market context. However, the matched evidence is only a single DOI entry with no in-text citation context, and the citing note emphasizes EEG metric robustness rather than signaling-model use. This is not safe to drop, but current evidence is insufficient to clearly mark as substantive.
